hero.badge: AI workspace for Bangladeshi business operators
hero.title: Launch and grow your business in Bangladesh with AI-guided support
hero.subtitle: Get practical guidance for trade license, eTIN, VAT, RJSC, finance, payments, compliance, and startup planning in one localized AI workspace built for founders, freelancers, online sellers, and SMEs.
hero.panelSubtitle: Localized business planning and compliance guidance
hero.sampleUser: I want to start an online clothing business in Dhaka. What should I do first?
hero.sampleAssistant: Start with your business structure, trade license, eTIN, payment setup, and basic bookkeeping. I can prepare a step-by-step checklist based on your business type, location, and budget.
hero.firstStepsText: Trade license, eTIN, payment method, cost plan
hero.localizedText: Bangladesh-focused guidance with practical action order

trustBadges: Built for founders, freelancers, and SMEs

stats.title: Registration clarity
stats.text: Understand trade license, eTIN, RJSC, VAT/BIN, and other starting requirements in a simpler flow.

stats.title: Finance and payments
stats.text: Get support for pricing, gateway choices, startup costing, and basic bookkeeping habits.

stats.title: Trustworthy guidance
stats.text: Use curated knowledge and practical context instead of chasing scattered answers across random links.

stats.title: Workspace continuity
stats.text: Keep your planning, questions, and next steps in one reusable AI-powered business workspace.

problem.title: Bangladesh founders often need guidance before they need complexity
problem.description: Starting a business should not require guessing your way through registrations, taxes, payments, and compliance. Start Koro AI is designed to reduce uncertainty and organize what comes next.
problem.solutionText: It takes scattered startup and compliance questions and turns them into localized, practical guidance you can actually act on. Instead of information overload, you get clearer decisions, better sequencing, and a more confident path from idea to operation.

cards.title: Too many scattered rules
cards.description: Registration, tax, banking, payment setup, and compliance information often live in separate places with different wording.

cards.title: Unclear registration steps
cards.description: Founders lose time trying to figure out what should come first, what documents matter, and which authority handles each step.

cards.title: No single startup roadmap
cards.description: Most early operators need one practical workspace that turns business questions into an ordered, realistic action plan.

journey.title: A practical workflow for turning business questions into action
journey.description: The product is built to help founders move from uncertainty to ordered execution without losing context between sessions.

steps.title: Describe your business
steps.description: Share what you want to launch, where you will operate, and what stage you are in.

steps.title: Get localized AI guidance
steps.description: Receive practical guidance for trade license, eTIN, VAT/BIN, RJSC, finance, and payments.

steps.title: Follow your checklist
steps.description: Turn advice into a clear sequence of tasks, documents, and next decisions tailored to Bangladesh.

steps.title: Save and continue later
steps.description: Keep your chats, revisit past answers, and continue planning as your business grows.

features.title: A polished founder workspace, not just a basic chat box
features.description: Start Koro AI combines assistant guidance, structured knowledge, and reusable business tools into a more complete operating layer for entrepreneurs in Bangladesh.

items.title: AI Business Advisor
items.description: Ask business questions in English or Bangla and get practical answers grounded in local startup and compliance context.

items.title: Startup Journey Builder
items.description: Break a complex launch plan into a personalized sequence of steps, documents, registrations, and checkpoints.

items.title: Knowledge Base Search
items.description: Get retrieval-backed responses from curated guidance, business references, templates, and operational notes.

items.title: Excel Knowledge Upload
items.description: Admins can import structured CSV or Excel knowledge so the assistant can answer from a stronger local dataset.

items.title: Business Templates & Tools
items.description: Access planning prompts, payment setup references, compliance checklists, calculators, and practical starter assets.

items.title: User Workspace & History
items.description: Save conversations, reopen business threads, and keep planning work organized instead of restarting from scratch.

useCases.title: Designed for the people who actually build businesses
useCases.description: Whether you are launching your first idea or supporting multiple early-stage operators, Start Koro AI is designed to be useful in real founder workflows.

items.title: First-time founders
items.description: Understand what to do first, which registrations matter, and how to avoid early-stage compliance confusion.

items.title: Freelancers
items.description: Get help with eTIN, payment collection, pricing setup, and operating more professionally with clients.

items.title: Online sellers
items.description: Plan trade license basics, payment gateways, bookkeeping habits, and low-cost growth decisions for commerce.

items.title: SME owners
items.description: Use Start Koro AI as a practical support layer for tax questions, operational planning, and business process clarity.

items.title: Student entrepreneurs
items.description: Validate ideas, estimate setup needs, and move from side-project thinking into an actionable business roadmap.

items.title: Incubators & startup teams
items.description: Support portfolio founders with a reusable knowledge system for common questions, workflows, and local business basics.

popularQuestions.title: The kinds of startup and compliance questions people ask first
popularQuestions.description: These are common questions founders, freelancers, and online sellers can use as a starting point inside the AI assistant.
items: How do I get a trade license in Dhaka?
Do freelancers in Bangladesh need eTIN?
When should I register a private limited company with RJSC?
What documents are needed for VAT/BIN registration?
How much capital do I need to start an online clothing shop?
Which payment gateways work for small online sellers?

resources.title: Keep official ecosystem references within reach
resources.description: Start Koro AI can help you navigate next steps, but official authorities and qualified advisors should be used to verify legal, tax, and regulatory matters.
resources.warning: Legal, tax, regulatory, and licensing matters should be verified with official authorities or qualified professionals before final action.

testimonials.title: Built to feel useful, not abstract
testimonials.description: The product should help operators move faster on practical decisions without pretending to replace professional judgment.

items.name: Nusrat Jahan
items.quote: It helped me turn a vague business idea into a clear checklist for licensing, payments, and first-month operations.

items.name: Arif Hossain
items.quote: Instead of searching five different places, I could ask one question and get a practical answer that actually fit Bangladesh.

items.name: Tahmid Rahman
items.quote: The structure feels useful for early founders who need direction, not theory. It shortens the time between confusion and action.

faq.title: Clear guidance, with responsible limits
faq.description: Start Koro AI is meant to make business planning and operational guidance more accessible. It should be used as a practical assistant, not as a substitute for regulated professional advice.

items.question: Can this replace a lawyer or tax advisor?
items.answer: No. Start Koro AI is designed for educational and operational guidance. For legal, tax, regulatory, or high-stakes decisions, users should verify with qualified professionals or official authorities.

items.question: Does it support Bangla?
items.answer: Yes. The product direction supports both English and Bangla so entrepreneurs can work in the language that is more practical for them.

items.question: Can admins upload Excel FAQ data?
items.answer: Yes. Admins can import structured CSV or Excel knowledge so the assistant can answer from curated rows of business Q&A.

items.question: Is it suitable for early-stage founders?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is especially useful for founders, freelancers, online sellers, and small teams who need clarity on what to do first.

items.question: How does the AI use the knowledge base?
items.answer: The assistant retrieves relevant chunks from curated knowledge before generating an answer, so responses can be grounded in your stored business references and admin-uploaded content.

finalCta.title: Ready to turn your business idea into a clear action plan?
finalCta.description: Ask Start Koro AI your first question and get a practical roadmap tailored for Bangladesh, your business type, and your next real decision.

footer.description: An AI-powered business assistant for Bangladeshi entrepreneurs, startups, SMEs, freelancers, and online sellers who need clearer next steps.
footer.noteText: Guidance is educational and operational in nature. Users should verify legal, tax, and regulated matters with qualified professionals or official authorities.

admin.sidebarDescription: Manage startup guidance, bulk imports, and the retrieval library.
admin.workspaceDescription: Upload structured knowledge, add manual answers, and maintain the retrieval dataset.

upload.label: Bulk Upload
upload.description: Import CSV or Excel knowledge rows.

admin.bulkDescription: Upload a `.csv`, `.xlsx`, or `.xls` file. Expected columns: `title`, `question`, `answer`.
admin.previewDescription: Review a few rows before importing them into the knowledge base.
admin.progressReady: Progress tracking is active for this upload.
admin.noParsedRows: No parsed rows yet. Upload a file to preview the mapped content.
checklistItems: Keep one knowledge item per row.
Use concise titles so admins can scan the library later.
The importer skips rows missing `title`, `question`, or `answer`.
Each imported row becomes one searchable manual QA document.
admin.manualDescription: Use this for curated answers that should be easy to retrieve and maintain.
